confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of needle transfers and timing. Fast-forward segments make exact penalty assessment challenging, but no obvious drops or placement errors observed. Timer progression clearly visible.
cannot_determine: Exact number of drops during fast-forward segments
Precise peg placement accuracy during accelerated portions
technique_summary: Solid intermediate-level performance with consistent bimanual coordination. Completion time of 125 seconds places this in the intermediate range (60-120s expert, 120-300s novice), suggesting developing but not yet expert-level skill.
strengths: Smooth initial needle loading and positioning
Consistent rhythm maintained across all transfers
improvement_suggestions: Work on speed optimization to achieve sub-120 second expert range
Practice more efficient instrument exchanges to reduce transfer time
Focus on minimizing hesitation between transfers
